mapper.update: UPDATE account SET blance = blance + #{blance} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transcation (sender_account, receiver_account, amount, type) VALUES (#{sender_account}, #{receiver_account}, #{amount}, #{type})
mapper.update: UPDATE account SET blance = blance + #{blance} WHERE account_number = #{account_number}
UPDATE account SET blance = blance - #{blance} WHERE account_number = #{account_number}
